name: Perimeter Solutions, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a leading provider of industrial products and services that support critical and complex customer missions across a range of niche applications. Our current operations span firefighting products, lubricant additives, electronic components and, following the acquisition of Medical Manufacturing Technologies, LLC (MMT) in January 2026, highly engineered machinery for the medical device industry.
